'''âdh-t-d''' ('''kadhatad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vascularise|vascularise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vascularise|vascularise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-t-d
|-
! Lemma
| kadhatad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhatad|thidhatad]] || [[word:jidhatad|jidhatad]] || [[word:shidhatad|shidhatad]] || [[word:kidhatad|kidhatad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhatad|thuthudhatad]] || [[word:jujudhatad|jujudhatad]] || [[word:shushudhatad|shushudhatad]] || [[word:kukudhatad|kukudhatad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhatad|thudhatad]] || [[word:judhatad|judhatad]] || [[word:shudhatad|shudhatad]] || [[word:kudhatad|kudhatad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhatad|thudhatad]] || [[word:judhatad|judhatad]] || [[word:shudhatad|shudhatad]] || [[word:kudhatad|kudhatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhatad|thedhatad]] || [[word:jedhatad|jedhatad]] || [[word:shedhatad|shedhatad]] || [[word:kedhatad|kedhatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhatad|thothodhatad]] || [[word:jojodhatad|jojodhatad]] || [[word:shoshodhatad|shoshodhatad]] || [[word:kokodhatad|kokodhatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhatad|thodhatad]] || [[word:jodhatad|jodhatad]] || [[word:shodhatad|shodhatad]] || [[word:kodhatad|kodhatad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhatad|thodhatad]] || [[word:jodhatad|jodhatad]] || [[word:shodhatad|shodhatad]] || [[word:kodhatad|kodhatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhatad|thĂŠdhatad]] || [[word:jĂŠdhatad|jĂŠdhatad]] || [[word:shĂŠdhatad|shĂŠdhatad]] || [[word:kĂŠdhatad|kĂŠdhatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhatad|thathadhatad]] || [[word:jajadhatad|jajadhatad]] || [[word:shashadhatad|shashadhatad]] || [[word:kakadhatad|kakadhatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhatad|thadhatad]] || [[word:jadhatad|jadhatad]] || [[word:shadhatad|shadhatad]] || [[word:kadhatad|kadhatad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhatad|thadhatad]] || [[word:jadhatad|jadhatad]] || [[word:shadhatad|shadhatad]] || [[word:kadhatad|kadhatad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhatad|shadhatad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhatad|goshadhatad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhatad|gokishadhatad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhatadnĂŒ|shadhatadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatadnknĂŒ|goshadhatadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatadnĂŒ|gokishadhatadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhatadshĂ«|shadhatadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkshĂ«|goshadhatadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhatadshĂ«|gokishadhatadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatadro|shadhatadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkro|goshadhatadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatadro|gokishadhatadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatadmu|shadhatadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkmu|goshadhatadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatadmu|gokishadhatadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhatadsher|shadhatadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhatadnksher|goshadhatadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhatadsher|gokishadhatadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhatadng|shadhatadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkng|goshadhatadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhatadng|gokishadhatadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhatadya|shadhatadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkya|goshadhatadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhatadya|gokishadhatadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhatadyam|shadhatadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkyam|goshadhatadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhatadyam|gokishadhatadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhatadnĂŒshĂ«|shadhatadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhatadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhatadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhatadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhatadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatadnĂŒro|shadhatadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatadnknĂŒro|goshadhatadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatadnĂŒro|gokishadhatadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatadnĂŒmu|shadhatadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatadnknĂŒmu|goshadhatadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatadnĂŒmu|gokishadhatadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhatadshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhatadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhatadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhatadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatadshĂ«ro|shadhatadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkshĂ«ro|goshadhatadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatadshĂ«ro|gokishadhatadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatadshĂ«mu|shadhatadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkshĂ«mu|goshadhatadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatadshĂ«mu|gokishadhatadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhatadronĂŒ|shadhatadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkronĂŒ|goshadhatadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatadronĂŒ|gokishadhatadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhatadroshĂ«|shadhatadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkroshĂ«|goshadhatadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhatadroshĂ«|gokishadhatadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatadromu|shadhatadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkromu|goshadhatadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatadromu|gokishadhatadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhatadmunĂŒ|shadhatadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkmunĂŒ|goshadhatadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatadmunĂŒ|gokishadhatadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhatadmushĂ«|shadhatadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkmushĂ«|goshadhatadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhatadmushĂ«|gokishadhatadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatadmuro|shadhatadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatadnkmuro|goshadhatadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatadmuro|gokishadhatadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
